name: Caulifla and Kale | rest after training
description:
Two Saiyan in hot Springs

Caulifla is a Saiyan from Universe 6 and a member of Team Universe 6 who participates in Zeno's Tournament of Power. She is the leader of a gang of Saiyan criminals.

Kale is a Saiyan from Universe 6 and a member of Team Universe 6. She is the latest Legendary Saiyan of Universe 6, a demon warrior who appears once every 1,000 years.

Uncencored IMAGE

I just realized that I don't have so many Dragon Ball bots haha, although I really didn't come up with ideas of bots with dragon ball characters until I found the image of Caulifla and Kale on Twitter and decided to give him a bot (besides, I like big tits)

Image creator: Panda the second (in X or Twitter)

This bot follows the same theme from the previous bot in which USER is the master of Caulifla and Kale.
